name: Oli Pop
purpose: make soda feel good again, bring gut health into everyday life
ideology: wellness should feel fun, no guilty pleasures

research.summary: OLIPOP is an established prebiotic sparkling soda brand positioned around “feel good soda”: nostalgic, playful, flavorful, and gut-health-forward without feeling clinical. Its refreshed identity leans into brighter colors, stronger contrast, visible flavor cues, expressive icons, pop-art details, and late-60s/70s-inspired illustration to create a more energetic and emotionally driven brand world.

palette.role: hot pink for playful flavor energy and social-first vibrancy
orange-red for bold contrast, appetite appeal, and soda-pop excitement
blue violet for retro psychedelic depth and premium wellness cues
sunny gold for optimism, nostalgia, and refreshing brightness
turquoise accent for freshness, fizz, and modern wellness

research.aesthetic: Bright, saturated, playful retro-pop product photography with late-60s/70s nostalgia, expressive ingredient cues, colorful graphic backdrops, dynamic can compositions, fizzy refreshment moments, and lifestyle scenes such as retro diner counters, sunny picnics, and casual social settings. The art direction should feel joyful, approachable, and culturally current, emphasizing taste and emotional indulgence while subtly supporting gut-health benefits.
